snippet:
I usually don’t write reviews but this one DESERVES IT. My friends and I are big fans of escape rooms, but Escape the Box Toronto was a whole new level of creativity. This was our first time trying something like this, and it completely exceeded our expectations. It wasn’t too easy or too hard—just the right amount of challenge to keep us thinking, laughing, and moving.

What really stood out was how thoughtfully crafted the experience was. Each clue led us to a new, surprising spot in the city. We ended up discovering parts of Toronto we’d never noticed before—even as locals! It honestly felt like a mini adventure around the city. One detail I really appreciated was how they chose locations carefully—not only were they interesting, but they also made sure the final stop was in a spacious, quiet area away from the busy streets.

Such a unique and memorable experience—highly recommend to anyone looking for something fun and different to do in Toronto!

A fun outdoor escape room where the room is as big as your city

🧩 Start solving your immersive puzzles
🏙️ Go around downtown Toronto for clues
🃏 Try to check all boxes and lots of fun
🚓 End the challenge with an epic adventure in the city!

It was honestly so much fun to complete this outdoor escape room challenge! All our friends had a great time and we definitely recommend trying the escape box

snippet:
I had no expectations or idea what this was about other than an outdoor escape room.

We picked up the box at the boardgame2go.
You need to scan the QR code to get instructions and hint.

The instructions were clear and the challenge of the puzzles were doable. Not too hard but not too easy. The hints were pretty helpful!

Overall I think this was fun, we took about 1.5 hrs to finish. It was a great way to explore downtown Toronto and I love how the hints tie in together with the surroundings. Love how there’s an actual story and some video clips in the website. I can tell they put a lot of planning and effort into this!

Would love to come back and check their sequel!

snippet:
Escape Box by Kiwi Kingdom is a pretty cool way to adventure around the city.

Imagine you and your friends are explorers, tasked with finding a lost city. You get this box filled with all sorts of clues, puzzles, and objects.The puzzles are a mix of brain teasers and hands-on challenges.

The best part is the feeling of accomplishment when you finally solve each step which is super satisfying! Plus, working together with friends to solve the mysteries makes it even more fun while exploring the city.

It can take up to the estimated 1-2 hours, especially if you get stuck on a puzzle or two.

Overall , it's a great way to explore. If you're into puzzles and love a good challenge, I'd definitely recommend giving Escape Box by Kiwi Kingdom a try.

snippet:
An Unforgettable Outdoor Escape Box Adventure!

I recently had the pleasure of participating in an outdoor escape box experience, and it was nothing short of exceptional! Combining the thrill of an escape room with the freedom of an outdoor setting, this activity delivered a perfect blend of adventure, teamwork, and clever challenges. A perfect way to explore Toronto for an afternoon.

The puzzles were brilliantly designed—challenging yet solvable with logical thinking and collaboration. Each clue seamlessly connected to the next, creating a satisfying sense of progress as we moved through the city.

One of the standout features was the way the game incorporated the outdoor environment. I felt like I was walking through the story with the designer, where she had actually been to the locations because the puzzles were so interwoven with the different locations. The box also wasn't just a props box; it became an integral part of the experience, with hidden compartments, clever props, and interactive elements blending naturally with the surroundings of the various sites we visited. This added a unique layer of immersion that you don’t get in a traditional escape room or digital site-specific game.

snippet:
🥰 WOW! This combines all my favourite things : escape rooms, scavenger hunt & tour of Toronto! It's a creative & colourful way to see the city. As a local it gives me new eyes & if I was a tourist this would be a super cool way to experience things like a local :)

I 💯% recommend this, not only is this unique but it's a the coolest way to experience our city & things even locals miss!

💌 This is especially good for:

🎄 Holiday gift experiences
🥳 Holiday team building events
🎂 Bday surprises!
💍 Proposals / bachelor/lette partys
💝 Gifts in general :)
